## Description / Excerpt

A phased roadmap for moving ShimmeryMemory from a canonical artifact archive into a glyph-aware field, Shimmer Lab host, and reader-responsive semantic interface.

Excerpt:

## Current State ShimmeryMemory.com already has the foundation of a semantic archive: - Astro publishing substrate - Markdown content collection - essay index - essay detail route - glyph-aware content conventions - canonical frontmatter fields - attribution conventions - project
